methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $1.0B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 5 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in AI & Software. Range: $250M - $300.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in AI & Compute

private.name: OpenAI
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Seed), post-money $300B+

private.name: Thinking Machines Lab
private.rationale: Same sector (AI & Software), same stage (Seed), post-money $12B

data.narrative:
Sakana AI is a Seed-stage AI & Software company founded by Llion Jones and David Ha, currently valued at $1.0B post-money with $200M+ raised. The peer universe comprises five comparable same-sector and adjacent-stage companies including OpenAI, Thinking Machines Lab, Liquid AI, Field AI, and Twelve Labs, alongside one public comparable (Palantir).

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using a 2.5x Seed-to-next-stage step-up multiplier on the $1.0B last post-money valuation, implies $2.5B. Peer-median analysis across the five comparables yields a median of $2.4B, though the peer set displays wide dispersion ($250M floor to $300.0B ceiling, reflecting OpenAI's outsized position). The peer median approach is somewhat constrained by this heterogeneity; notably, removing OpenAI and Thinking Machines Lab would materially lower the central tendency.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $2.0B (low) to $2.9B (high), with a median of $2.4B. This range reflects reasonable agreement between stage-progression and peer multiples. Key uncertainties include the appropriate weighting of extreme outliers within the peer set and whether stage-progression multipliers remain stable given capital availability and founder quality variation in AI markets. The wide spread in comparable valuations also suggests that company-specific factors—product maturity, differentiation, capital efficiency—materially affect fair value within this band.
